craigslist.title: Vaulted Ceilings, Two Enclosed Dog Parks
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 98 Devonshire Dr, Scott Depot, WV 25560 Welcome to Wexford Village at Devonshire. This is the community you’ve been searching for. Our 1, 2, and 3 bedroom floor plans are carefully designed to maximize comfort, style, and spaciousness— providing residents with a blueprint for the good life. Each apartment home is fitted with an open-concept kitchen layout, energy efficient appliances, contemporary cabinetry, hardwood-style flooring, plush carpeting, and an array of modern design elements. Wexford Village at Devonshire is where Scott Depot discovers the heart of home. Schedule your tour today. Apartment Features: Large Walk-In Closets Modern Lighting Fixtures Ceiling Fans Throughout Vaulted Ceilings Built-In Microwaves Bright, Well-Lit Vanities Granite-Inspired Countertops Open-Concept Kitchen Layouts Community Features: Ample Parking Pristine Landscaping Outdoor Lounge with Fireplace Onsite Masseuse Resort-Style Swimming Pool 24/7 Business Center Two Enclosed Dog Parks Tennis and Basketball Courts Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://livingmonarch.com/qnrdrdn5/wexford-village-at-devonshire Equal Housing Opportunity. Specials are based on availability and may expire or change at any time. Specials and discounts may not be combined. Rates are subject to change without advance notice.
